title: OpenAI Presence is about to take another leap into corporate software
excerpt: OpenAI's new Presence product signals its push beyond AI models into business software and AI-powered work.
content_html:
Exclusive

OpenAI is launching new corporate software that takes it beyond the AI model war

By Stephen Council

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

and Alistair Barr

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

OpenAI is launching a new product that could help the company take another step beyond the ultra-competitive business of making AI models.

The offering, called OpenAI Presence, helps companies run AI agents better by connecting these systems to internal corporate data, policies, existing software, and workflows.

It's designed to automate parts of customer support, sales, and other tasks such as fixing billing issues, supporting insurance claims, or resolving employee IT service requests.

This is the latest example of OpenAI trying to move beyond selling access to AI models and into more parts of the corporate software market. While Presence could help OpenAI win more corporate business, it could also leave the startup competing with some of its AI model customers.

The new service includes features that let a customer test their agent for a chosen job, including simulations, guardrails, human review, and automated graders that use AI to check agent outputs. Once these agents launch inside companies, OpenAI's Codex tool can investigate issues that crop up and suggest updates.

Presence also comes with AI-powered voice and chat technology, which could help corporate customers automate more interactions with existing and potential customers.

OpenAI is making the service available to corporate customers on a case-by-case basis. Users must work with OpenAI's engineers or designated partners to access the tool.

"The agent receives only the knowledge and system access required for that job," OpenAI said. "The company sets the policies: what the agent can do, when it needs approval, and when a person should take over."

OpenAI is already using the tool to run its AI phone support channel for English speakers, the startup said.

The AI model race is becoming fiercely competitive, with rivals including Anthropic, Google, xAI, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, and others all offering increasingly capable models. This month, new open-weight Chinese AI models have shown again that performance gaps are narrowing, prices are falling, and many customers are becoming more willing to switch between providers.

That dynamic creates pressure on OpenAI to move into enterprise software, where products are stickier, and where customers buy complete business solutions rather than just AI models.

Presence appears to be part of that strategy. Instead of asking companies to build their own agent systems, OpenAI is packaging the surrounding software needed to deploy AI safely inside large organizations.

OpenAI isn't the only AI lab moving beyond models. Earlier this year, Anthropic launched an Enterprise AI Services company and expanded its Claude Partner Network to help businesses integrate AI into their operations.

With Presence, OpenAI increasingly looks less like a model company and more like an enterprise software provider with AI at its core.

Sign up for BI's Tech Memo newsletter here. Reach out to me via email at abarr@businessinsider.com.

blocks.html_en: OpenAI is launching a new product that could help the company take another step beyond the ultra-competitive business of making AI models.

sentences.en: OpenAI is launching a new product that could help the company take another step beyond the ultra-competitive business of making AI models.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 正在推出一款新产品，可以帮助该公司在竞争激烈的人工智能模型制作业务之外再迈出一步。

blocks.html_en: The offering, called OpenAI Presence, helps companies run AI agents better by connecting these systems to internal corporate data, policies, existing software, and workflows.

sentences.en: The offering, called OpenAI Presence, helps companies run AI agents better by connecting these systems to internal corporate data, policies, existing software, and workflows.
sentences.zh: 该产品名为 OpenAI Presence，通过将这些系统连接到内部公司数据、策略、现有软件和工作流程，帮助公司更好地运行人工智能代理。

blocks.html_en: It's designed to automate parts of customer support, sales, and other tasks such as fixing billing issues, supporting insurance claims, or resolving employee IT service requests.

sentences.en: It's designed to automate parts of customer support, sales, and other tasks such as fixing billing issues, supporting insurance claims, or resolving employee IT service requests.
sentences.zh: 它旨在自动化部分客户支持、销售和其他任务，例如解决计费问题、支持保险索赔或解决员工 IT 服务请求。

blocks.html_en: This is the latest example of OpenAI trying to move beyond selling access to AI models and into more parts of the corporate software market. While Presence could help OpenAI win more corporate business, it could also leave the startup competing with some of its AI model customers.

sentences.en: This is the latest example of OpenAI trying to move beyond selling access to AI models and into more parts of the corporate software market.
sentences.zh: 这是 OpenAI 试图超越销售人工智能模型的访问权限，进入企业软件市场更多领域的最新例子。

sentences.en: While Presence could help OpenAI win more corporate business, it could also leave the startup competing with some of its AI model customers.
sentences.zh: 虽然存在可以帮助 OpenAI 赢得更多企业业务，但也可能会让这家初创公司与其一些人工智能模型客户展开竞争。

blocks.html_en: The new service includes features that let a customer test their agent for a chosen job, including simulations, guardrails, human review, and automated graders that use AI to check agent outputs. Once these agents launch inside companies, OpenAI's Codex tool can investigate issues that crop up and suggest updates.

sentences.en: The new service includes features that let a customer test their agent for a chosen job, including simulations, guardrails, human review, and automated graders that use AI to check agent outputs.
sentences.zh: 新服务包括让客户测试其代理的选定工作的功能，包括模拟、护栏、人工审查和使用人工智能检查代理输出的自动评分器。

sentences.en: Once these agents launch inside companies, OpenAI's Codex tool can investigate issues that crop up and suggest updates.
sentences.zh: 一旦这些代理在公司内部启动，OpenAI 的 Codex 工具就可以调查突然出现的问题并建议更新。

blocks.html_en: Presence also comes with AI-powered voice and chat technology, which could help corporate customers automate more interactions with existing and potential customers.

sentences.en: Presence also comes with AI-powered voice and chat technology, which could help corporate customers automate more interactions with existing and potential customers.
sentences.zh: Presence 还配备了人工智能驱动的语音和聊天技术，可以帮助企业客户自动与现有和潜在客户进行更多交互。

sentences.en: A dashboard shows OpenAI's new Presence service.
sentences.zh: 仪表板显示 OpenAI 的新 Presence 服务。

sentences.en: OpenAI
sentences.zh: 开放人工智能

blocks.html_en: OpenAI is making the service available to corporate customers on a case-by-case basis. Users must work with OpenAI's engineers or designated partners to access the tool.

sentences.en: OpenAI is making the service available to corporate customers on a case-by-case basis.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 正在根据具体情况向企业客户提供该服务。

sentences.en: Users must work with OpenAI's engineers or designated partners to access the tool.
sentences.zh: 用户必须与OpenAI的工程师或指定合作伙伴合作才能访问该工具。

blocks.html_en: "The agent receives only the knowledge and system access required for that job," OpenAI said. "The company sets the policies: what the agent can do, when it needs approval, and when a person should take over."

sentences.en: "The agent receives only the knowledge and system access required for that job," OpenAI said.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 表示：“代理仅接收该工作所需的知识和系统访问权限。”

sentences.en: "The company sets the policies: what the agent can do, when it needs approval, and when a person should take over."
sentences.zh: “公司制定政策：代理人可以做什么、何时需要批准以及何时应该由人接手。”

blocks.html_en: OpenAI is already using the tool to run its AI phone support channel for English speakers, the startup said.

sentences.en: OpenAI is already using the tool to run its AI phone support channel for English speakers, the startup said.
sentences.zh: 该初创公司表示，OpenAI 已经在使用该工具为英语使用者运行人工智能手机支持频道。

blocks.html_en: The AI model race is becoming fiercely competitive, with rivals including Anthropic, Google, xAI, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, and others all offering increasingly capable models. This month, new open-weight Chinese AI models have shown again that performance gaps are narrowing, prices are falling, and many customers are becoming more willing to switch between providers.

sentences.en: The AI model race is becoming fiercely competitive, with rivals including Anthropic, Google, xAI, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, and others all offering increasingly capable models.
sentences.zh: AI 模型竞争变得越来越激烈，Anthropic、Google、xAI、Meta、Mistral、DeepSeek 等竞争对手都提供了功能越来越强大的模型。

sentences.en: This month, new open-weight Chinese AI models have shown again that performance gaps are narrowing, prices are falling, and many customers are becoming more willing to switch between providers.
sentences.zh: 本月，新的开放权重中国人工智能模型再次表明，性能差距正在缩小，价格正在下降，并且许多客户变得更愿意在提供商之间切换。

blocks.html_en: That dynamic creates pressure on OpenAI to move into enterprise software, where products are stickier, and where customers buy complete business solutions rather than just AI models.

sentences.en: That dynamic creates pressure on OpenAI to move into enterprise software, where products are stickier, and where customers buy complete business solutions rather than just AI models.
sentences.zh: 这种动态给 OpenAI 带来了进入企业软件领域的压力，因为企业软件中的产品更具粘性，客户购买完整的业务解决方案而不仅仅是人工智能模型。

blocks.html_en: Presence appears to be part of that strategy. Instead of asking companies to build their own agent systems, OpenAI is packaging the surrounding software needed to deploy AI safely inside large organizations.

sentences.en: Presence appears to be part of that strategy.
sentences.zh: 存在似乎是该策略的一部分。

sentences.en: Instead of asking companies to build their own agent systems, OpenAI is packaging the surrounding software needed to deploy AI safely inside large organizations.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 没有要求公司构建自己的代理系统，而是打包了在大型组织内安全部署 AI 所需的周边软件。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI isn't the only AI lab moving beyond models. Earlier this year, Anthropic launched an Enterprise AI Services company and expanded its Claude Partner Network to help businesses integrate AI into their operations.

sentences.en: OpenAI isn't the only AI lab moving beyond models.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 并不是唯一一家超越模型的人工智能实验室。

sentences.en: Earlier this year, Anthropic launched an Enterprise AI Services company and expanded its Claude Partner Network to help businesses integrate AI into their operations.
sentences.zh: 今年早些时候，Anthropic 成立了一家企业人工智能服务公司，并扩大了其 Claude 合作伙伴网络，以帮助企业将人工智能集成到其运营中。

blocks.html_en: With Presence, OpenAI increasingly looks less like a model company and more like an enterprise software provider with AI at its core.

sentences.en: With Presence, OpenAI increasingly looks less like a model company and more like an enterprise software provider with AI at its core.
sentences.zh: 凭借 Presence，OpenAI 越来越不像一家模范公司，而更像一家以 AI 为核心的企业软件提供商。

blocks.html_en: Alistair Barr is the author of Business Insider's Tech Memo newsletter. Sign up here. Before that, he was BI's Global Tech Editor and the Big Tech team leader at Bloomberg, following a reporting career at The Wall Street Journal, USA Today, Reuters, and MarketWatch. Alistair won a Gerald Loeb Award in 2007 for coverage of short selling and was a finalist in 2013 for scoops on the Facebook IPO. More recently, he won a 2024 San Francisco Press Club award for commentary. Got a tip? Reach out using the secure messaging app Signal (+1 415-341-4927) or via email on abarr@businessinsider.com.ExpertiseAlistair oversees all things Big Tech, along with startups and venture capital. He writes analysis and columns about topics including generative AI, large language models, cloud computing, semiconductors, online search, e-commerce, EVs, robotics, and autonomous vehicles.Popular StoriesArtificial Intelligence:It's getting harder to make big leaps at the frontier of AIOpenAI's AI-adjusted earnings numbers have echoes of Groupon and WeWorkDeath by LLM: Stack Overflow's decline, and its plan to survive, shows the future of free online data in an AI worldCloud computing:Amazon dominated the first cloud era. The AI boom has kicked off Cloud 2.0, and the company doesn't have a head start this time.In cloud, there's AI (which is hot) and everything else (which is not)Chips:Why Intel is still so important: Real countries have fabsApple's made-in-the-USA chips signal a turnaround for the US's big semiconductor betEVs and Tesla:Tesla's AI supercomputer has a Silicon Valley town rushing to meet surging electricity demandTesla's Cybertruck is outselling almost every other EV in the USOnline Search:Google is losing its status as a verbA simple way to fix search: Bright pink ads

content_html_zh:
独家的

OpenAI 正在推出新的企业软件，使其超越人工智能模型之战

作者：Stephen Council 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 和 Alistair Barr 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

OpenAI 正在推出一款新产品，可以帮助该公司在竞争激烈的人工智能模型制作业务之外再迈出一步。

该产品名为 OpenAI Presence，通过将这些系统连接到内部公司数据、策略、现有软件和工作流程，帮助公司更好地运行人工智能代理。

它旨在自动化部分客户支持、销售和其他任务，例如解决计费问题、支持保险索赔或解决员工 IT 服务请求。

这是 OpenAI 试图超越销售人工智能模型的访问权限，进入企业软件市场更多领域的最新例子。 虽然存在可以帮助 OpenAI 赢得更多企业业务，但也可能会让这家初创公司与其一些人工智能模型客户展开竞争。

新服务包括让客户测试其代理的选定工作的功能，包括模拟、护栏、人工审查和使用人工智能检查代理输出的自动评分器。 一旦这些代理在公司内部启动，OpenAI 的 Codex 工具就可以调查突然出现的问题并建议更新。

Presence 还配备了人工智能驱动的语音和聊天技术，可以帮助企业客户自动与现有和潜在客户进行更多交互。

OpenAI 正在根据具体情况向企业客户提供该服务。 用户必须与OpenAI的工程师或指定合作伙伴合作才能访问该工具。

OpenAI 表示：“代理仅接收该工作所需的知识和系统访问权限。” “公司制定政策：代理人可以做什么、何时需要批准以及何时应该由人接手。”

该初创公司表示，OpenAI 已经在使用该工具为英语使用者运行人工智能手机支持频道。

AI 模型竞争变得越来越激烈，Anthropic、Google、xAI、Meta、Mistral、DeepSeek 等竞争对手都提供了功能越来越强大的模型。 本月，新的开放权重中国人工智能模型再次表明，性能差距正在缩小，价格正在下降，并且许多客户变得更愿意在提供商之间切换。

这种动态给 OpenAI 带来了进入企业软件领域的压力，因为企业软件中的产品更具粘性，客户购买完整的业务解决方案而不仅仅是人工智能模型。

存在似乎是该策略的一部分。 OpenAI 没有要求公司构建自己的代理系统，而是打包了在大型组织内安全部署 AI 所需的周边软件。

OpenAI 并不是唯一一家超越模型的人工智能实验室。 今年早些时候，Anthropic 成立了一家企业人工智能服务公司，并扩大了其 Claude 合作伙伴网络，以帮助企业将人工智能集成到其运营中。

凭借 Presence，OpenAI 越来越不像一家模范公司，而更像一家以 AI 为核心的企业软件提供商。

在此注册 BI 的技术备忘录时事通讯。 请通过电子邮件与我联系：abarr@businessinsider.com。

有小费吗？ 请通过电子邮件 scouncil@businessinsider.com 或通过短信、Signal、Telegram 或 WhatsApp 联系本记者：415-757-8198。 使用个人电子邮件地址、非工作 WiFi 网络和非工作设备；这是我们安全共享信息的指南。

Stephen Council 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

Stephen 是 Business Insider 的高级技术记者，报道 OpenAI、Anthropic 以及领先人工智能公司的生态系统。此前，他曾报道 SFGATE 的技术，并为《华尔街日报》、《The Information》和 CNBC 撰稿。 他在西北大学学习新闻学和经济学。他的作品获得了 SF 新闻俱乐部调查报道奖，并于 2025 年获得 SPJ NorCal 技术报道卓越新闻奖。Stephen 住在旧金山。 请通过电子邮件 scouncil@businessinsider.com 或通过 Signal、Telegram 或 WhatsApp 联系他：415-757-8198。 使用个人电子邮件地址、非工作 WiFi 网络和非工作设备；这是我们安全共享信息的指南。

Alistair Barr 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

阿利斯泰尔·巴尔 (Alistair Barr) 是《商业内幕》科技备忘录时事通讯的作者。 在这里注册。 在此之前，他曾担任 BI 的全球科技编辑和彭博社的大型科技团队负责人，此前曾在《华尔街日报》、《今日美国》、路透社和 MarketWatch 从事报道工作。 阿利斯泰尔 (Alistair) 因报道卖空而于 2007 年获得杰拉尔德·勒布奖 (Gerald Loeb Award)，并于 2013 年因 Facebook IPO 独家报道入围决赛。 最近，他荣获 2024 年旧金山新闻俱乐部评论奖。 有小费吗？ 使用安全消息应用程序 Signal (+1 415-341-4927) 或通过电子邮件 abarr@businessinsider.com 进行联系。ExpertiseAlistair 负责监管大型科技以及初创企业和风险投资的所有事务。 他撰写的分析和专栏涉及生成式人工智能、大型语言模型、云计算、半导体、在线搜索、电子商务、电动汽车、机器人和自动驾驶汽车等主题。 热门故事人工智能：在 AI 前沿取得巨大飞跃越来越困难 OpenAI 的 AI 调整后收益数字与 LLM 的 Groupon 和 WeWorkDeath 相呼应：Stack Overflow 的衰落及其生存计划显示了 AI 世界中免费在线数据的未来云计算：亚马逊主导了第一个云时代。 AI热潮拉开了Cloud 2.0的序幕，这家公司这次并没有领先。在云中，有AI（很热），也有其他一切（很不热）芯片：为什么英特尔仍然如此重要：真正的国家有晶圆厂苹果的美国制造芯片预示着美国大型半导体betEV和特斯拉的转机：特斯拉的AI超级计算机有一个硅谷小镇急于迎接汹涌的电力需求特斯拉的赛博卡车在美国的销量几乎超过了所有其他电动汽车在线搜索：谷歌正在失去其动词地位修复搜索的简单方法：亮粉色广告
